coachAM: Your aspiration to be "the best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" is actively sabotaged by the foundational physical and mental disciplines, specifically your Sleep Protocol, Training, and Sovereign Morning, which all sit at a failing 50% completion, directly stemming from the "procrastination, laziness" you consistently identify in your journal entries. The root cause is a fundamental disconnect between your stated intentions and your executed behaviors, indicating a critical lack of self-governance that will inevitably collapse your elite trajectory if you cannot consistently command your own actions before demanding output from others. Today, before 9:30 PM, set a physical alarm in a separate room for 4:30 AM and confirm its placement with your accountability partner.
